what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links a memory entry to an image asset located in the design-source channel.
observations: File body is empty after the frontmatter
standouts: Uses a custom image:// URI scheme for the target
concerns: The image target URI is opaque and not resolvable from this file alone
No alt text, caption, or description of the image is provided
No author or provenance beyond the timestamp
notes: A minimal, timestamped attachment metadata record pointing an image asset in the design-source channel.
questions: What content is shown in image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-01?
Which channel-memory entry does this attachment belong to?
Why was this specific image attached?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment metadata record, which matches its apparent purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to attach a specific design-source deck image to a channel memory item so it can be retrieved or referenced later.
novelty: The use of an image:// URI scheme as the attachment target and the absence of any descriptive body content.
contribution: It contributes a concrete, timestamped binding between a channel memory entry and a design-source image asset, preserving when the attachment was added.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that records an image asset target in the design-source channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To associate a design-source image with a channel memory entry for later retrieval and context.
